title: qaphats #7092
definition:
1) to draw together, close, shut, shut up, stop up
    1a) (Qal) to shut
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to draw oneself together (of death)
        1b2) to be shut up to death
    1c) (Piel) springing, skipping (participle)
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal) to shut
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to draw oneself together (of death)

    NASB:  draw together, shut
